rows.title: 9 Gallon 5.0 PHP STEALTHSONIC QUIET VACUUM
rows.description: The 9 Gallon Wet/Dry Vacuum is built for jobsite cleanups. It's easy to transport and features a powerful, heavy-duty motor for maximum performance. Strong suction delivers the performance you need for tough jobs. It features a fine-dust cartridge filter for small, dry debris and wet materials, a handle for easy carrying, large on/off switch with water-resistant design for quick access, and convenient, built-in 10 ft. power cord. Keep attachments and tools organized with the onboard accessory bag. Swiveling casters provide ease of movement in any direction while a built-in tank drain makes it easy to empty liquids.
features: Powerful 5.0 Peak HP motor provides maximum power of suction and high air flow to clean up the toughest messes
Stealthsonic quiet technology delivers less that 65 dba of noise to allow for conversations and no need for hearing protection
additional_features: 9 Gallon Durable no break virgin resin Poly Tub with built in tank drain gives you plenty of cleaning power and space. Tank has large and durable handles to deal with the toughest of messes
Rubberized durable non marring swivel casters provide steady and easy movement across tough surfaces
Strong carrying handle that also functions as a convenient cord wrap
Integrated hose management design allows for easy storage and portability
Large water-resistant switch for easy on/off operation
Easy Filter Change and Cleaning with Clean Connect locking system
Optional Accessories available Fine Particle Dust Bags (DXVC4111 ) and High Effiency Cartridge Filters (DXVC6912) or HEPA Filter (DXVC6914)
includes: (1) Crush resistant 1-7/8 in. x 7 ft hose (DXVA19-2500)

rows.title: 5.0 HP Stainless Steel Wet/Dry Vacuum (10 gal)
rows.description: This 10 Gallon, 5.0 HP Stainless Steel Wet/Dry Vacuum is rugged, portable, and convenient for quick jobsite cleanups. With a powerful motor for maximum performance, it delivers strong suction power for heavy-duty pickup. Use the included fine-dust cartridge filter for small, dry debris, and wet materials. The sturdy carrying handle makes it easy to take this vacuum to the mess. A large on/off switch with water-resistant design, built-in 10 ft. power cord, and accessory bag to keep attachments and tools organized make this vacuum ideal for keeping on the jobsite or in your work van. Swiveling casters provide ease of movement in any direction while a built-in tank drain makes it easy to drain liquids.
features: Ideal for large cleanups on the jobsite
Powerful 5.0 peak horsepower motor provides the suction needed for most cleanup jobs
Rubberized casters on the front and large rear wheels provide easy maneuverability
additional_features: Extra long, 10 ft. power cord with cord wrap helps you reach the mess
Built-in blower port powerful enough to blow sawdust and debris from most any workshop
Built-in accessory storage bag keeps all accessories neatly organized
Large built-in tank drain makes it easy to empty liquids
Accessories included: 2-1/2 in. x 7 ft. hose, 2 extension wands, washable & reusable cartridge filter, floor nozzle, utility nozzle, crevice nozzle, disposable filter bag & accessory storage bag

rows.title: 12 Gallon 5.5 PHP STEALTHSONIC QUIET VACUUM
rows.description: The 12 Gallon, 5.5 HP Wet/Dry Vacuum has a convenient handle and large rear wheels for easy maneuverability around the jobsite, even when the tank is full. It features a fine-dust cartridge filter for small, dry debris and wet materials. With a large, water-resistant on/off switch, built-in 20 ft. power cord, and accessory bag to keep tools and attachments organized, this tough vacuum is built for the jobsite. Move it in any direction with the swiveling casters, and empty liquids easily with the built-in tank drain.
features: Powerful 5.5 Peak HP motor provides maximum power of suction and high air flow to clean up the toughest messes
Optional Accessories available Fine Particle Dust Bags (DXVC4112 ) and High Effiency Cartridge Filters (DXVC6912) or HEPA Filter (DXVC6914)
additional_features: Stealthsonic quiet technology delivers less that 65 dba of noise to allow for conversations and no need for hearing protection
Large 12 G Durable no break virgin resin Poly Tub with built in tank drain gives you plenty of cleaning power and space. Tank has large and durable handles to deal with the toughest of messes
Rubberized durable non marring swivel casters provide steady and easy movement across tough surfaces
Extra-long 20 Ft power cord with cord wrap design
Strong carrying handle that also functions as a convenient cord wrap
Integrated hose management design allows for easy storage and portability
Large water-resistant switch for easy on/off operation
Easy Filter Change and Cleaning with Clean Connect locking system
includes: (1) Crush resistant 2. 5 inch x 7 ft hose (DXVA19-2501)

rows.title: 6.5 HP Stainless Steel Wet/Dry Vacuum (16 gal)
rows.description: Our 16 Gallon, 6.5 HP Stainless Steel Wet/Dry Vacuum is built tough with the power, durability, and capacity for jobsite duty. Get this mobile vacuum to wherever you need it easily with the convenient carrying handle and swiveling casters. The included fine-dust cartridge filter is perfect for small, dry debris and wet materials. The large on/off switch with water-resistant design is built to last and provide easy operation. A built-in 20 ft. power cord gives you long reach. Keep tools and attachments organized with the onboard accessory bag.
features: Powerful 6.5 peak horsepower motor provides strong suction for tough cleanups
Rubberized casters on the front and large rear wheels provide easy maneuverability
additional_features: Extra-long, 20 ft. power cord with cord wrap for reach and neat storage
Built-in blower port powerful enough to blow sawdust and debris from most workshops
Built-in accessory storage bag to keep tools and attachments neatly organized
Large built-in tank drain makes it easy to empty liquids
